\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4535 introduces Delta Expectation Value as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
